regional_cost_note: Roofers in Christchurch typically charge $130–$380/m² for a full re-roof. Canterbury has a large pool of experienced roofers following post-earthquake insurance work. LBP verification is essential.

businesses.name: Re-Roofing Specialists
businesses.known_for: Operating since 1975; 4.9 Google rating from 100+ reviews; Canterbury's most experienced re-roofing firm.

businesses.name: Huston Cross Roofing
businesses.known_for: Specialist in major residential re-roofing; particularly sought-after for tile-to-Colorsteel upgrades across Canterbury.

businesses.name: The Roofer — Adrian Simmons
businesses.known_for: Ultimate specialist for architectural, heritage, and complex roofing materials; London City & Guilds qualified with decades of local experience.

businesses.name: Canterbury Roofing
businesses.known_for: Full residential and commercial roofing; re-roofing, repairs, spouting, and solar panel roof penetrations.

businesses.name: Christchurch Roofing Contractors
businesses.known_for: RANZ members; trusted post-earthquake repair specialists with strong insurance claim experience.
